title: Returns policy
text: Customers may return unopened items within 30 days.

title: Shipping delays
text: Winter storms may delay deliveries in northern regions.

title: Garantia
text: Los productos tienen una garantia limitada de 12 meses.

title: Assistant knowledge scope
text: The assistant can answer questions about topics that are present in the knowledge base: returns, shipping delays, warranty, payment methods, invoices, account access, order cancellation, damaged items, data privacy, support hours, loyalty points, and international shipping. If a question is not covered by the available documents, the assistant must say that it does not have enough context. Russian keywords: ассистент может ответить на вопросы о возвратах, доставке, гарантии, оплате, счетах, доступе к аккаунту, отмене заказа, поврежденных товарах, персональных данных, часах поддержки, бонусных баллах и международной доставке.

title: Payment methods
text: Customers can pay with Visa, Mastercard, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and bank transfer. Cash on delivery is not supported. Russian keywords: способы оплаты, карта, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, банковский перевод, наличные при доставке не поддерживаются.

title: Invoices and receipts
text: Invoices and payment receipts are available in the customer account after an order is paid. A customer can download the invoice from the Orders page or request a copy from support. Russian keywords: счет, инвойс, квитанция, чек, заказ, страница заказов, копия счета, поддержка.

title: Account access and password reset
text: If a customer cannot access an account, they should use the password reset link on the sign-in page. The reset link expires after 30 minutes. Support can help if the customer no longer has access to the registered email address. Russian keywords: аккаунт, доступ, пароль, сброс пароля, ссылка для сброса, вход, email.

title: Order cancellation
text: An order can be cancelled before it is shipped. After shipment, the customer must wait for delivery and then follow the returns process. Cancellation is not guaranteed once warehouse processing has started. Russian keywords: отмена заказа, отменить заказ, до отправки, после отправки, складская обработка.

title: Damaged or missing items
text: If an item arrives damaged or an item is missing from the package, the customer should contact support within 7 days of delivery. The customer should provide the order number, photos of the package, and a description of the issue. Russian keywords: поврежденный товар, отсутствующий товар, посылка, доставка, фото упаковки, номер заказа, поддержка.

title: Customer data privacy
text: Customer personal data is used only to process orders, provide support, prevent fraud, and meet legal obligations. Customers may request deletion of their account data unless retention is required by law. Russian keywords: персональные данные, приватность, удаление аккаунта, обработка заказов, поддержка, предотвращение мошенничества.

title: Support hours
text: Customer support is available Monday to Friday from 09:00 to 18:00 CET. Weekend requests are collected and answered on the next business day. Urgent payment or security issues are prioritized. Russian keywords: часы поддержки, поддержка работает, понедельник, пятница, выходные, следующий рабочий день, срочные вопросы.

title: Loyalty points
text: Customers earn 1 loyalty point for every 1 euro spent on eligible products. Loyalty points can be used as a discount on future orders. Points expire 12 months after they are earned. Russian keywords: бонусные баллы, программа лояльности, один балл за евро, скидка, будущие заказы, срок действия 12 месяцев.

title: International shipping and customs
text: International shipping is available to selected countries. Delivery time depends on the destination country and customs processing. Customs duties and import taxes are the responsibility of the customer unless stated otherwise at checkout. Russian keywords: международная доставка, таможня, страна назначения, импортные налоги, таможенные пошлины, оформление заказа.
